summary: Completed testing of NEWME CLASS Yayasan features. All 20 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend tests pass: Yayasan registration, login, dashboard tabs (stats, users, test results, wallet, settings), Admin yayasan management, Admin withdrawals, TestResult share buttons (WA/FB/IG), and free test teaser blur.

issues: Status shows 'Menunggu Verifikasi' for demo account - expected for new accounts, admin can verify via /admin/yayasan

critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET_KEY env var mismatch still exists from iteration_1 - backend/.env has JWT_SECRET but code reads JWT_SECRET_KEY. This is a security concern but does not break current functionality.
Yayasan wallet commission credit logic is implemented correctly in payments.py credit_yayasan_commission() function - 10% commission on payment approval

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All yayasan pages and features working

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed yayasan accounts during backend testing. Demo yayasan account created/used for frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Yayasan features fully working: (1) Registration generates unique YYS-prefixed referral code, (2) Login returns JWT token with type='yayasan', (3) Dashboard has 5 tabs: Dashboard, Pengguna, Hasil Test, Wallet, Pengaturan, (4) Wallet shows balance/transactions and withdrawal form (min 50k), (5) Admin can verify/toggle yayasan at /admin/yayasan, (6) Admin can approve/reject withdrawals at /admin/withdrawals. TestResult page has share buttons for WA/FB/IG. Free test results show blur teaser with upgrade CTA.

features_tested.yayasan_registration: PASS - Generates unique referral code (YYS prefix + name + uuid)
features_tested.yayasan_login: PASS - JWT token returned with type='yayasan'
features_tested.yayasan_dashboard_stats: PASS - Shows totalUsers, completedTests, pendingUsers, paidUsers, totalEarnings
features_tested.yayasan_dashboard_users: PASS - Lists users who used referral code with filter
features_tested.yayasan_dashboard_results: PASS - Shows premium test results from referrals
features_tested.yayasan_wallet: PASS - Shows balance and transaction history
features_tested.yayasan_withdrawal: PASS - Validates min amount (50k) and balance
features_tested.yayasan_referral_price_update: PASS - Can update price within limits
features_tested.admin_yayasan_list: PASS - Shows all yayasan with verify/toggle actions
features_tested.admin_withdrawals: PASS - Shows pending/approved withdrawals with approve/reject
features_tested.test_result_share_buttons: PASS - WA, FB, IG share buttons present
features_tested.free_test_teaser: PASS - Blur effect with upgrade CTA for Karakter, Kekuatan Jatidiri, Kompilasi Adaptasi
